## Summary
The `make fast-ci` command **failed** with exit code 2. Here are the results:
### Failure Point **Prettier formatting check failed** - 2 files have code style issues: 1. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
### What Passed - **Lint (ruff)**: All checks passed - **Format Check (ruff format)**: 1689 files already formatted - **Markdown Check**: Passed (no output means no issues) - **Exec Reference Check**: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **AGENTS.md standard**: Passed - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing**: All 19 files properly paired with no violations - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5978 passed, 2 warnings - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 31 passed (completed before error)
